title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Q1 2026 Financial Results: DAYBUE and NUPLAZID Sales Growth, Reaffirms Full Year Guidance
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Q1 2026 Financial Results. Revenue Performance: Total GAAP revenues reached $268 million, representing a 10% year-over-year increase. DAYBUE: $101 million in net sales, up 20% YoY. NUPLAZID: $167 million in net sales, up 5% YoY (6% on a non-GAAP adjusted basis). Profitability: Net income declined to $4 million ($0.02 per diluted share) from $19 million ($0.11 per share) in Q1 2025. Financial Position: Acadia maintained strong liquidity with $851 million in cash, cash equivalents, and investment securities as of March 31, 2026. Full-Year 2026 Guidance (Reaffirmed): Total revenues: $1.22–$1.28 billion. NUPLAZID sales: $760–$790 million. DAYBUE sales: $460–$490 million. The company expressed confidence in achieving these targets despite Q1 profitability headwinds.
